name: Challenge: Accept

description.en: Match the stake and bet that the challenger will fail. If they skip — you take it.
description.de: Gleiche den Einsatz aus und wette darauf, dass der Challenger scheitert. Wenn er aufgibt — nimmst du den Einsatz.

bot: Accepts an open challenge by matching the creator's stake. Requires the exact same token and amount as the creator staked. Query getChallenge first to get the token and exact amount.

inputs.name: Matching Stake

description.en: Match the creator's token and amount exactly.
description.de: Gleiche Token und Betrag des Erstellers genau aus.

inputs.bot: Must match the challenge stake exactly — same token identifier and same amount. Query getChallenge first to get both.

success.en: You're in! The clock is ticking.
success.de: Du bist dabei! Die Uhr tickt.
